title: Explosive Projectiles
description: Makes all projectiles explode upon impact.
body:
Explosive Projectiles is a Data Pack that causes all player usable projectiles such as an arrow or an egg, to explode upon impact. That's all it does. To install it download the data pack, and then when creating a world click on more, Data Packs, drag the zip file into the window, create the world, and you're done. Have fun!

Working MC Versions - 1.17, 1.18, 1.19, and 1.20

Native MC Version - 1.20
